Title: Verify system architecture
Test Steps:
1. Observe the components in the system architecture diagram.
2. Verify that the DataManager is a central hub, connecting most of the other components.
3. Verify that the WebServer acts as an intermediary between the DataManager and the Database.
4. Verify that the ReportHandler receives data directly from the DataManager.
5. Verify that the AuthenticationSystem, UserProfile, NotifySystem, and Achievements all interact with the DataManager.
Expected Result: All components are correctly connected as described in the UML diagram.

Title: Verify Report class attributes and operations
Test Steps:
1. Observe the attributes of the Report class.
2. Verify that the attributes are correctly defined: id, utenteId, periodo, commento.
3. Observe the operations of the Report class.
4. Verify that the operations are correctly defined: getReport(), getConsumi(), getSuggerimenti().
Expected Result: The Report class attributes and operations are correctly defined as described in the UML diagram.

Title: Verify User class attributes and operations
Test Steps:
1. Observe the attributes of the User class.
2. Verify that the attributes are correctly defined: id, Nome, Cognome, DataDiNascita, Email, Password, Sesso, greenPoints, consumi.
3. Observe the operations of the User class.
4. Verify that the operations are correctly defined: getUtenti(), setUsername(), setBirthDate(), setEmail(), setSex(), getTotaleConsumo().
Expected Result: The User class attributes and operations are correctly defined as described in the UML diagram.

Title: Verify Consumo class attributes and operations
Test Steps:
1. Observe the attributes of the Consumo class.
2. Verify that the attributes are correctly defined: id, utenteId, quantita, data.
3. Observe the operations of the Consumo class.
4. Verify that the operations are correctly defined: getConsumoGiornaliera(), getConsumoMensile().
Expected Result: The Consumo class attributes and operations are correctly defined as described in the UML diagram.

Title: Verify Main component interactions
Test Steps:
1. Observe the interactions of the Main component with the Local User and Data Manager.
2. Verify that the Main component initiates authentication checks and data requests.
3. Verify that the Main component receives data from the Local User and Data Manager.
4. Verify that the Main component does not handle user data or data storage.
Expected Result: The Main component interacts correctly with the Local User and Data Manager as described in the UML diagrams.

Title: Verify Local User component interactions
Test Steps:
1. Observe the interactions of the Local User component with the Main component, Data Manager, and user.
2. Verify that the Local User component requests data from the user and the Data Manager.
3. Verify that the Local User component does not handle data storage or authentication.
4. Verify that the Local User component returns data to the Main component.
Expected Result: The Local User component interacts correctly with the Main component, Data Manager, and user as described in the UML diagrams.

Title: Verify Data Manager component interactions
Test Steps:
1. Observe the interactions of the Data Manager component with the Main component, Local User, and various data entities.
2. Verify that the Data Manager component stores and retrieves data.
3. Verify that the Data Manager component does not handle user authentication or user interface.
4. Verify that the Data Manager component communicates with the WebServer.
Expected Result: The Data Manager component interacts correctly with the Main component, Local User, and various data entities as described in the UML diagrams.

2. Verify that the WebServer component acts as an intermediary between the Data Manager and the Database.

Expected Result: The WebServer component interacts correctly with the Data Manager as described in the UML diagram.
